items.raw_desc: Kanál Made in Japan kanál Matt 15 cm:        Made In Japan is an Australian brand that imports Japanese ceramics from the Mino area, where the soil is rich in many of the ingredients needed for production. Ceramics is therefore aptly called Minoyaki. This Made in Japan Matt spoon in black also comes from this workshop. Minoyaki is appreciated for being handmade and hiding centuries-old traditions that inspire local artists. Each piece of dishes is original and its colours are permanent and do not peel off. The design of the spoon is simple, which highlights the material and its quality. It does not contain any metals or other harmful substances. The advantage is the use of a Made in Japan spoon in the dishwasher and in the microwave. items.raw_desc: Autószerelő szerszám COMPASS szivattyútömlő 13 mm × 200 cm:                    Key features of the COMPASS Auto Mechanics Tool, Pumping Hose, 13 mm × 200 cmSelf-priming hose for transferring liquids, e.g. pumping fuel or draining waterThe self-priming hose works on the principle of gravity, the flow of liquids by self-primingThe hose is fitted with a metal end acting as a non-return valveThe end is fitted with a ball to prevent backflow of liquidsMaterial:PVCInstructions for use: Before starting the liquid transfer, the end of the hose should be placed in the container where the liquid is to be transferred, this container should always be placed lower than the level of the liquid to be pumped. The end of the hose fitted with the valve is placed in the container with the pumped liquid and the tip of the hose is dipped into the pumped liquid several times. In this way, the hose is gradually filled and the liquid then flows arbitrarily. The flow will be terminated by pulling out the intake section.
